title: Over Jacket Oil
description: The Over jacket is an illustration of our focus on quality materials. An update on the classic Harrington style, it’s cut from our matte cotton and nylon fabric – a Korean-milled cloth noted for its matte, powdery hand feel and showerproof finish – and features a traditional two-button stand collar, a two-way zip closure and an elasticated hem. 66% Cotton 34% Nylon Lining: 95% Polyester 5% Elastane Made in China Chest width for size M is 72,5 cm

title: X Nanamica Insulation Pants Indigo
description: 68% Cotton 32% Cotton Made in Japan

title: Another Jacket 5.0 Brown Tweed
description: This tweed blouson jacket combines the crisp texture of the Harris Tweed fabric with luxurious, voluminous wool fibers. Cut in a relaxed silhouette with raglan sleeves, a full lining, and wide arms.

title: Bryn Coat Black/ White
description: The classic car coat reimagined through a contemporary lens, Bryn is underpinned by our use of impeccable materials. It’s constructed from an Italian-milled mouline wool – created by twisting different coloured yarns to achieve a pleasing, dappled finish and selected for its clean, tailored look and cosy hand feel. Bryn is intended to sit just below the knee and is finished with a buttery leather collar and a back vent.

title: Korine Shoe Chocolate
description: Korine is a relaxed twist on the classic loafer silhouette and leans into Studio Nicholson’s penchant for clean, pared-back lines. They’re constructed from grained deerskin leather and defined by an elasticated heel that ensures maximum comfort and ease of wear.

title: Gambler Shirt Dark Taupe Fuzz
description: The Gambler Shirt has an oversized fit with drop shoulders and a curved hem. Featuring a spread collar and snap button placket. Cut from a soft, garment dyed Tencel® jersey with a subtle pilling effect in a muted brown. This garment is made from carefully sourced natural material and treated using a process that gives each piece its own individual shade and character. Variations are intentional and part of the garment’s identity. With time and wear, the garment will naturally evolve, taking on unique characteristics.

title: Gobi Bear Bomber Pilous Berry
description: This oversized bomber jacket offers a relaxed, slightly cropped fit with raglan sleeves, turn-down collar and knitted cuffs. Featuring two welt pockets, two inside pockets and a two-ways front zip. An exceptional faux fur from the renowned German manufacturer Steiff®, made from a blend of alpaca, mohair, and cotton. Its wildly textured, extra-hairy surface is bold and expressive, blending playful nostalgia with artisanal quality.

title: Loose Denim Jeans Indigo
description: Easy trousers crafted from wool cashmere flannel, featuring the beautiful texture of cashmere and the natural volume and elasticity of wool, with a warm and soft fleece-like touch. Made from a blend of white cashmere and Australian merino extrafine lambswool (17.5μ), the fabric is exceptionally light and soft. The side seams are slightly twisted to add subtle nuance to the silhouette. 80% Wool 20% Cashmere Made in Japan Waist width for size M is 74 cm

title: Silk/Nylon Single Breasted Jacket Taupe
description: Single layer, easy fit jacket crafted from original silk nylon fabric with a peach touch finish, achieved through sand-washing after dyeing and utilizing the fibrillation of the silk yarn. Designed to retain the structure of a classic jacket, the shoulder construction, lapels, jacket length, and sleeve length are carefully set. Puckering after garment dyeing and subtle texture of the fabric add further character. 85% Silk 15% Nylon. Made in Japan. Chest width for size M is 64,2 cm.

title: Oversized Double Breasted Jacket Grey Khaki
description: Double breasted jacket crafted from brand's original wool gabardine, woven at high density using 2/90 Super120’s yarns and piece-dyed. Off-scale and special resin treatments give the fabric a deep, rich color while enhancing body and resilience, resulting in a distinctive texture. Wide body width and drop shoulder silhouette feature unique silhouette. Vertical silhouette against wide body width by adjusting sleeve length and sleeve cap angle. 100% Wool Made in Japan Chest width for size M is 63.35 cm

title: Para Cord Hand Knit Bag Black
description: Hand knitted bag using thick paracord. Strap length can be adjusted by tying. Comes with a drawstring pouch made from ultra suede made by Toray.

title: Oversized Layered Combination Coat Grey
description: Docking coat crafted from an ultra lightweight fabric woven from a blended yarn of 17.5μ (Super 120’s) Geelong lambswool and Inner Mongolian cashmere, finished with a charme beaver treatment. The fabric is distinguished by its thin, lightweight feel, supple texture with soft fullness, and a subtle, refined sheen. Designed as a layered coat, the hem of the outer coat flows seamlessly into the hem of the long inner vest, creating a harmonious, elegant silhouette.

title: Client Coat Black Heavy Canvas
description: 100% Cotton Made in Portugal

title: Tam O Shanter Lambswool Seaweed
description: The MHL. Tam O Shanter is knitted in lambswool with a soft, felted hand feel. 100% Lambswool. Made in United Kingdom.

title: Press Stud Trousers Double Twisted Cotton Canvas Petrol
description: The MHL. Press Stud Trousers have a relaxed cut and are fabricated in dense cotton canvas with a soft hand feel. Referenced from the MHL. Wide Leg Jogger, the style is constructed with an elasticated waist with double press stud closure, slant welt pockets with stitch-through detailing and a jet back pocket with concealed zip fastening. The trousers are finished with press stud hem adjusters.

title: Sports Trousers Cotton Wool Drill Graphite
description: The MHL. Sports Trousers have a relaxed, loose cut and tapered leg and are fabricated in heavy midweight cotton wool drill with a pronounced weave and dry soft hand feel. The trousers are constructed with a button fastening, side-elasticated waistband with wide belt loops, and finished with a deep hem and stitch-through welt pockets on the back yoke. 80% Cotton 20% Wool Made in Portugal

title: Basic Shirt Two Tone Cotton Stripe Forest/ Grey/ Off White
description: A core MHL. design, the Basic Shirt has a relaxed cut and is fabricated in dense cotton plainweave with a dry hand feel, developed exclusively for MHL. The shirt is constructed with a raised placket, large chest pocket, side gusset stitch detailing and pleats on the back yoke.

title: Cargo Pocket Trousers Plain Cotton Drill Taupe
description: The MHL. Cargo Pocket Trousers have a relaxed, loose cut and are fabricated in lightly brushed, dense cotton drill with a soft hand feel, in colours developed exclusively for MHL. The trousers are constructed with deep flap button fastening cargo patch pockets with concealed hand pockets, and a welt pocket on the back yoke.

title: Press Stud Trousers Double Twisted Cotton Canvas Black
description: The MHL. Press Stud Trousers have a relaxed cut and are fabricated in dense cotton canvas with a soft hand feel. Referenced from the MHL. Wide Leg Jogger, the style is constructed with an elasticated waist with double press stud closure, slant welt pockets with stitch-through detailing and a jet back pocket with concealed zip fastening. The trousers are finished with press stud hem adjusters. 100% Cotton Made in Portugal

title: Basic Shirt Brushed Cotton Chambray Khaki Green
description: 100% Cotton Made in Portugal

title: Chore Shirt Double Twisted Cotton Canvas Petrol
description: The MHL. Chore Shirt has a relaxed, overshirt cut and is fabricated in dense cotton canvas with a soft hand feel. The shirt is constructed with press stud fastenings, a stitch-through chest pocket, button adjustable cuffs and a vent split hem with herringbone tape detailing.

title: Chore Shirt Double Twisted Cotton Canvas Black
description: The MHL. Chore Shirt has a relaxed, overshirt cut and is fabricated in dense cotton canvas with a soft hand feel. The shirt is constructed with press stud fastenings, a stitch-through chest pocket, button adjustable cuffs and a vent split hem with herringbone tape detailing.

title: Overhead Shirt Cotton Wool Drill Bone
description: The MHL. Overhead Shirt has a relaxed, overshirt cut and is fabricated in midweight cotton wool drill with a pronounced weave and soft hand feel. The shirt is constructed with a raised placket with contrast herringbone tape and box stitch detailing, button-through patch chest pockets and an elongated back hem. 80% Cotton 20% Wool Made in Portugal Shipping & returns Shipping: You can find all our shipping costs at Shipping & Returns. Return: Sportivo has a 14 days return policy.

title: Collarless Shirt Compact Cotton Poplin Grape
description: The MHL. Collarless Shirt has an oversized cut and dropped shoulder, and is fabricated in compact cotton poplin with a lightly brushed, papery hand feel. The shirt is constructed with a stitch-through placket, button-through patch pocket, curved side gusset and stitch-through internal pocket.

title: Oversized Knitted Polo Dry Wool Uniform Blue
description: The MHL. Oversized Knitted Polo is knitted in midweight wool with a dry hand feel, in a colour developed exclusively for MHL. Knitted in a dense Milano stitch, it features a contrasting rib on the neck, cuffs and hem, and is finished with flatlock stitch detailing on the back yoke and seams.

title: Overall Shirt Graphic Grid Check Cotton Slate Blue/ Off White
description: A core MHL. design, the Overall Shirt has a relaxed, boxy cut and dropped shoulder and is fabricated in midweight cotton linen plainweave with a dry hand feel, developed exclusively for MHL. The shirt is constructed with a raised placket, button-through chest patch pocket and stitch side gusset detailing.

title: Oversized Knitted Polo Dry Wool Dark Brown
description: The MHL. Oversized Knitted Polo is knitted in midweight wool with a dry hand feel, in a colour developed exclusively for MHL. Knitted in a dense Milano stitch, it features a contrasting rib on the neck, cuffs and hem, and is finished with flatlock stitch detailing on the back yoke and seams.

title: Straight Cut Jeans Vintage Blue
description: The Straight Cut Jeans has a relaxed straight fit with a mid-rise. Made with side pockets, rear patch pockets, flower rivets, metal button closure and YKK zip fly. Cut from a garment washed organic cotton twill in a faded blue.

title: Convenient Shirt White
description: The Convenient Shirt has a relaxed fit with drop shoulders and a rounded hem. Made with button placket, spread collar, back yoke pleats and a divided chest pocket. Cut from a garment washed, crisp organic cotton poplin in white. 100% Cotton Made in Portugal Shipping & returns Shipping: You can find all our shipping costs at Shipping & Returns. Return: Sportivo has a 14 days return policy.

title: Straight Cut Jeans Stonewashed Grey
description: The Straight Cut Jeans have a relaxed straight fit with a mid-rise. Made with side pockets, rear patch pockets, metal button closure and YKK zip fly. Cut from a washed organic cotton denim in a worn grey.

title: Lot.618 Side Henley Neck Shirt Navy
description: The shirt is based on wool jersey underwear of the 1940s. Underwear of the time often featured front openings, known as Henley neck, to compensate for the lack of elasticity. The opening is slightly shifted to the side because it was worn under a front-opening shirt so that the openings do not overlap each other. A self-fabric lining reinforces the back of the neckline. The jersey fabric is characterized by its natural unevenness. The yarns, reviving the ragged texture of the time when it was technically impossible to spin smooth and uniform yarns, is woven tightly. The cuffs reproduce the circular knitting double-layered rib typically found on undershirts from the 1910s. 100% Cotton Made in Japan Chest width for size 40 is 110 cm

title: Olkay Quilted Overshirt Navy Twill
description: This quilted overshirt comes with a relaxed fit. It features a curved hem, adjustable cuffs and side seam pockets. Patch pocket on the inside. Soft-touch cotton twill with a classic diagonal weave. This fabric offers a smooth, comfortable feel and a clean, structured drape.

title: Double-Breasted Peak Blazer Buckthorn Velvet
description: The Double-Breasted Peak Blazer offers a formal cut with an extra-wide peaked lapel and classic Frankfurter pockets. Versatile enough to pair with tapered, wide-leg, or our relaxed tailored trousers, it’s completed with our signature 'stay classy' label at the sleeve. A soft cotton velvet featuring a subtle pinstripe structure. Its plush surface and understated texture create a rich yet refined appearance.

title: Lot.606 Hooded Sweatshirt Bleached Heather Grey
description: The item is a reconstruction of Lot.606 Hooded Shirt, T.T's attempt to reinterpret the so-called 'Retrofit hoodie'. Elbow patch details are added to style as vintage clothing often found with repair patches. During times of material scarcity, things – including clothes – were treated as valuable resources. Users often reinforced worn-out elbows with leftover fabric they had on hand. Workers owned multiple denim items and frequently repurposed damaged, unwearable denim as patch material for reinforcement. The tubular jersey cotton was manufactured by a hanging knitting machine in Wakayama. Rongalite finish achieves a natural fade of a used garment.

title: Lot.528 A.R.C Vest Khaki
description: The item is based on a hand-knitted vest of the American Red Cross dating back to the 1940s. Among Takahashi's collection is a knitting book by the American Red Cross issued around 1917, when people across America were mobilized to send in goodwill hand-knitted garments to soldiers fighting on the front lines. The book introduces how to knit mufflers, hand warmers, and various other items. We analyzed the knitting techniques and details showcased in the book and updated the design for modern use. The fabric uses a blend of rare white cashmere and extra-fine lambswool yarns. The result is a lightweight, warm, and comfortable knit that combines the smoothness and flexibility of cashmere and fluffy elasticity of wool. SIZE: 363840 Chest width for size 38 is 94 cm. 80% Wool, 20% Cashmere Made in Japan

title: Lot.108 50S Italian Collar Shirt Hand Drawn Sumi
description: During the post-war economic boom, Italian collar shirts were popular at resorts. Characterized by the opening curvier than open collar shirts, it was a perfect item to look relaxed when T-shirts were still not part of the resort culture. Inspired by marbling works created with sumi ink by Kamisoe, a karakami workshop based in Kyoto, we hand-painted our original kasuri-patterned cotton- rayon fabric with sumi ink to capture the subtle nuances of brushstrokes crafted by a Yuzen dyeing artisan. Each piece is truly one of a kind, as the hand-drawn brushstrokes and variations in shading differ slightly from item to item. 60% Cotton 40% Rayon Made in Japan Chest width for size 15 is 120 cm

title: Lot.324 USMD Convalescent Jacket Natural Dyed Burgundy
description: The item is based on a hospital jacket produced in the U.S. in the 1940s. Hospital jackets were provided to soldiers recuperating in hospitals for use when going out. An article from the May 21, 1941 edition of The New York Times describes how the U.S. Forces designed uniforms for wounded soldiers and adopted MAROON as the color. MAROON, symbolizing cheerfulness, appears to have been chosen to uplift citizens' spirits during WWII, as well as for its laundering durability. After going through trials and errors in our efforts to recreate MAROON using natural dyeing, T.T ultimately settled on a slightly more violet shade of BURGANDY. The item uses satin fabric with densely woven weft yarns. Pre-treated with mercerization to enhance color, the fabric achieves vivid and smooth appearance. NATURAL DYED BURGUNDY uses natural "akane (madder)" dye. Akane, one of the oldest dyes dating back to the Yayoi period, has been used to produce red yarns in Japan. T.T achieved a deeper red by adjusting the dye composition. NATURAL DYED BEIGE is a natural dyeing made from bayberry (yamamomo) and persimmon tannin (kakishibu), both of which have been utilized as dyes and oriental medicines since old times. Passage of time adds depth to the color, as the tannin abundantly found in the dyes enhances the aged look. MUD DYED BROWN is carefully dyed one by one using "mud dye" , the traditional dyeing technique of Amami Oshima Island. None of them look the same, as all of them are one of a kind.

title: 5 Pocket Suede Rock
description: 100% Leather Made in Italy

title: Lot.321 Sports Jacket Brown
description: This sports jacket in the rider's style, inspired by 1950s motorcycle culture, features the tailored shoulder construction popular in the era and the round sleeves designed for ease of movement. To improve the fit, waist ribbing is re-knitted while pursuing softness in the circular knitting ribbed sleeves. The resulting design added comfort in the uncompromising craftsmanship of the time. BROWN uses a double weave fabric made from precious yak wool, retaining the natural color of the yak's fur.

title: Officer Zip Jacket Suede Rock
description: 100% Leather Made in Italy

title: Plaid Scarf Woolcash Charcoal
description: A double faced wool/cashmere blend scarf with a soft lush handfeel.

title: Rubber Zip Smock Hancock Black
description: A special piece handmade in Scotland. Features a stand up collar, 2-way chunky metal RIRI zipper, and metal chain hanger loop. Fully taped bonded cotton, making it 100% waterproof. Every piece of bonded cotton, sourced from Scottish producer Fothergill, is meticulously prepared. Then, using a specially formulated adhesive, makers apply this by hand, ensuring seamless bonding of fabric layers for superior durability and waterproofing. Each seam is carefully sealed with tape enhancing the garment’s waterproof properties providing long-lasting protection again the elements. Width chest is 61.5 cm in size M

title: Altitude Puffer Heat Black
description: The signature Altitude Puffer made a heat reactive polyester fabric. Fabric is changing color according to temperature, due to a reactive coating. Stuffed with real RDS down, 90/10 ratio. It's oversized with drop shoulders and a roomy articulated sleeve with darts on elbow. Features big welt pockets and a hidden zipper on front. 100% Polyester. Made in China. Chest width for size M is 71 cm.

title: Rubber Coat Hancock Black
description: A special piece handmade in Scotland. Features a half raglan sleeve, Hancock logo buttons, and metal chain hanger loop. Fully taped bonded cotton, making it 100% waterproof. Every piece of bonded cotton, sourced from Scottish producer Fothergill, is meticulously prepared. Then, using a specially formulated adhesive, makers apply this by hand, ensuring seamless bonding of fabric layers for superior durability and waterproofing. Each seam is carefully sealed with tape enhancing the garment’s waterproof properties providing long-lasting protection again the elements. Width chest is 63.5 cm in size M. 100% Cotton. Made in United Kingdom.

title: Gusto Shirt Pastell Stripe Flannel
description: Gusto Shirt is an oversized shirt with a regular collar, front patch pocket, straight hemline, and side slits. It has a pleat at the back. 61% Cotton 39% Lyocell Handmade in Italy Chest width is 59,1 cm for size M

title: Estate Jacket Brown Melange Stripe
description: 61% Rec. Wool 26% Rec. Polyester 13% Polyamide Made in Portugal

title: Patch Pocket Blazer Grey Worsted Wool
description: 100% Wool Made in Portugal

title: Double Breasted Blazer Black Wool
description: 100% Wool Made in Portugal

title: Jude Classic Button Down Shirt Boulder
description: Building on the proportions of the evergreen button-down shirt, Jude has an oversized body, large armholes for greater range of motion, and elongated sleeves. It’s cut from our noisy cotton; a fabric that lends itself to clean, uncomplicated lines and known for its satisfyingly crips handle. Jude is finished with a neat button-down collar.

title: Vista Elasticated Waist Jacket Washed Black
description: Studio Nicholson leans into classic field jacket silhouettes to create the Vista. It’s cut from our ‘typewriter’ cotton – a Japanese fabric chosen for its soft papery texture and the gentle rustling sound as it moves with the body. The jacket is crafted with dolman sleeves, four generous flap pockets and an elasticated drawcord waist that creates a relaxed, blouson fit.

title: District Crinkle Denim Jacket Black
description: The District jacket is a modern take on a classic workwear silhouette. It’s cut from our 13oz Japanese crinkle denim, which brings a relaxed feel to the structure, and is constructed with generous patch pockets, a neat button-through closure and a straight hem. District is finished with tonal topstitching.

title: Seb Crinkle Denim Jean Black
description: A wardrobe pillar from season to season, the Seb pants are cut from 13oz Japanese denim that’s washed to give a softer hand feel and noted for its crinkled finish. They’re constructed to a classic five-pocket profile and shaped with a straight leg and a dropped crotch, then finished with tonal topstitching.

title: Salin Pocket Detail Shirt Chalk Stripe
description: This lightweight shirt is woven in a fine, vintage-style stripe that’s exclusive to Studio Nicholson. The Salin shirt falls softly over the body with a washed, gently crinkled hand feel and features classic shirting details, including two patch pockets at the chest.

title: Paolo Denim Pant Indigo Wash
description: The Paolo jeans have a wide, balloon-shaped leg which creates a striking silhouette yet remain versatile and highly wearable, straddling the gap between tailored and casual. These are cut from a deep indigo-washed denim. 52% Generative Cotton 48% Cotton Made in Turkiye

title: Beto Wide Jeans Indigo Denim
description: The Beto Wide Jeans offer a fresh take on classic denim. Soft washed to achieve a vintage, worn appearance, these jeans are woven from 100% organic cotton in an Italian fabric mill renowned for its denim expertise since 1880s. Featuring long, wide legs, the Beto Wide Jeans create a contemporary silhouette with a relaxed fit. Designed with a traditional 5-pocket layout and a button fly.

title: Roversi 2 Button Linen Jacket Darkest Navy
description: The Roversi jacket recalls the slouchy, unstructured tailoring of the 90s. It’s cut from our slub linen viscose blend fabric – noted for its bouncy handle and tumbled to create a soft, washed finish. It’s tailored with notch lapels, a Melton undercollar and a welt pockets.

title: Moru Jacket Faille Black
description: Made from Faille with a washed finish, it features a classic shirt collar and concealed button placket for a clean, minimal look. Slash pockets at the front and two interior pockets offer subtle functionality, while the back yoke detail adds a structural dimension. Corozo buttons complete the piece with a natural, sophisticated touch, staying true to the CASEY/CASEY spirit. A dense and resilient cotton fabric, inspired by the robust spirit of traditional workwear. Its satin faille weave lends a subtle luster that will develop a rich patina over time, evolving with wear. Softened by a washed finish, it balances strength and suppleness, offering both structure and comfort.

title: Telmen Shirt Salt & Pepper Stripe
description: The Telmen Shirt comes with a regular fit, dropped shoulders and a straight hemline featuring a spread shirt collar and patched pockets. Lightweight cotton fabric with vertical stripes. Pre-washed for reduced shrinkage, featuring a clean surface and bold, contrasting look.

title: Cargo Pant Faille Black
description: A pant in faille with a washed finish, perfectly balancing functionality and relaxed style. Featuring two patch pockets on the front, one patch pocket at the back, and a tool pocket on the right side, it is thoughtfully designed for practicality. The waistband with button closure, button fly, and belt loops add a classic, sturdy touch. Finished with corozo buttons for a subtle and natural detail. These pants blend utilitarian spirit with elegance, true to the CASEY/CASEY aesthetic. A dense and resilient cotton fabric, inspired by the robust spirit of traditional workwear. Its satin faille weave lends a subtle luster that will develop a rich patina over time, evolving with wear. Softened by a washed finish, it balances strength and suppleness, offering both structure and comfort.

title: Jog Ah Pant Softy Chocolate
description: An iconic silhouette, the Jog AH Pant is crafted from Softy, a fluid, breathable blend of cotton and lyocell with a soft, washed finish. Designed for comfort and ease, it features an elasticated waist with internal drawstring closure, a button fly, and slash front pockets. A single back patch pocket completes the relaxed design. A refined take on a casual essential, combining effortless movement with quiet structure. A balanced blend of cotton and lyocell, this fabric offers a smooth, breathable feel with a subtle drape. The fabric is soft against the skin yet holds its shape well, combining natural comfort with gentle structure. Washed for added softness, it evolves beautifully over time.

title: Pannocchia Scarf Wooly 2 Bunga
description: Scarf crafted in Wooly, a superfine merino wool yarn with a soft washed finish. Knitted in a deep cob stitch at gauge 3 for warmth and texture. Finished with rolled-edge detailing for a subtle, organic touch. A refined winter essential with a natural hand feel. Soft, warm, and naturally breathable, with a smooth hand and subtle sheen. This refined yarn offers comfort and quiet durability, evolving gently with time and wear.

title: Abel Pant Paper Cot Pitch Black
description: A relaxed drawstring pant crafted in crisp, lightweight Paper Cotton with a washed finish. Features a button fly, jet and flap pockets at the front, and patch pockets with flaps at the back. The adjustable drawstrings at the waist and cuffs allow for a custom fit and playful volume. Both functional and expressive, this pant blends utility with a distinctive silhouette. CASEY/CASEY's signature fabric. Paper Cot is a regular weight cotton with a distinctively crisp, dry hand. Washed for added softness, it carries a naturally crumpled texture that recalls lived-in ease and gentle movement. Breathable and structured, it retains its form while allowing ease of movement. Quietly expressive. 100% Cotton Made in Portugal Chest width for size M is 80-88 cm.

title: Pannocchia Beanie Wooly 2 Light Grey
description: Beanie in superfine Merino wool. Knitted in a chunky gauge 3 cob stitch, this beanie is crafted from soft, high-quality Merino wool yarn for exceptional warmth and comfort. Features a classic rolled-edge finish and a soft wash treatment for a cozy, broken-in feel. A timeless cold-weather essential with subtle texture and depth. Soft, warm, and naturally breathable, with a smooth hand and subtle sheen. This refined yarn offers comfort and quiet durability, evolving gently with time and wear.

title: Mika Shirt Paper Cot Pitch Black
description: 100% Cotton Made in Portugal Chest width for size M is 100-108 cm

title: Square Scarf Wool Cash Browns
description: A square scarf in soft Woolcash. Finished with an exclusive Floral Print. An original design developed in collaboration with a print designer and close friend of Gareth. The motif has been explored in varying scales across a selection of fabrics, offering a sophisticated play on proportion across the collection. Presented in a palette of seasonal colourways, each variation reflects the deep, nuanced tones of the collection. Digitally printed in Italy on a featherlight cashmere-silk voile to capture the finest nuances of the original artwork. A soft, brushed blend of wool and cashmere. Light in weight, warm in nature. Ages beautifully, gaining softness and soul with time.

title: Big Raccourcie Shirt Greys
description: An iconic Casey/Casey shape, the Big Raccourcie Shirt is cut with ease and volume, offering a relaxed yet thoughtful silhouette. Crafted in printed cotton with a washed finish for a softened, tactile feel. Features a classic shirt collar, button front and cuffs, and corozo buttons throughout. The curved hem and elongated back bring rhythm and movement to the form, a timeless shirt with a quiet presence and playful proportions. Exclusive Floral Print cotton. An original design developed in collaboration with a print designer and close friend of Gareth. The motif has been explored in varying scales across a selection of fabrics, offering a sophisticated play on proportion across the collection. Presented in a palette of seasonal colourways, each variation reflects the deep, nuanced tones of the collection.

title: Another Shirt 3.0 Charcoal Stripe

This shirt is a part of brands selection of timeless elements for everyday life, all year round, for many years to come. title: Deconstructed Peak Blazer Faded Black Seercheck
description: Experience the fusion of timeless and modern design in our relaxed suit jacket. Combining classic blazer features such as patch pockets, front buttons, cuffs, and a back vent with a contemporary, sporty silhouette, this piece effortlessly transitions from day to night. Offering the comfort of casual wear while maintaining a refined edge suitable for various occasions. Crafted from a summery, bouncy linen fabric from Italy with a very special structured seersucker check and washed out look.

title: x Engineered Garments Forest Bather Hairy Suede Navy
description: New York based contemporary fashion label Engineered Garments and Tarvas reunite for their second collaboration - The EG x Tarvas Forest Bather. For this project, which marks the debut of the Forest Bather silhouette, Engineered Garments designer Daiki Suzuki took cues from the company's Nordic roots, producing a playful design that fuses elevated functionality with sophisticated design.

title: x Engineered Garments Forest Bather Hairy Suede Black
description: New York based contemporary fashion label Engineered Garments and Tarvas reunite for their second collaboration - The EG x Tarvas Forest Bather. Lining: Microfibre (Portugal) Sole: EVA (Portugal) & Rubber (Portugal) Insole: EVA W/Microfibre Surface (Portugal) Mudguard: Rubberized Canvas (Italy) Laces: Recycled Polyester (Estonia) Each pair is crafted in Portugal from European sourced materials and components.

title: Forest Bather Nylon/Suede Blue
description: The Forest Bather is the newest addition to Tarvas collection and it adds a relaxed, yet functional option to brand's range.
